paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

raw_extraction.innovation: **DQ-BART** introduces joint distillation and quantization techniques to compress and optimize sequence-to-sequence models like BART, achieving efficient low-bit inference while preserving performance.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Multilingual corpus (not explicitly named but implied from BART)
raw_extraction.application: Cross-lingual tasks, machine translation, text generation, summarization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Reducing computational cost and improving efficiency of large sequence-to-sequence models via quantization and distillation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Joint distillation and low-bit quantization for cross-lingual tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Combines **quantization** (ternary weights) with **knowledge distillation** to reduce model footprint without significant accuracy loss.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization
